summary: Made one surgical exit edit to cue the Caldera Junction layover and Marisol's transition into the Chapter 3 cafeteria scene. The opening already differed structurally from the visible adjacent opening, so it was left intact. No style-bible example lines were present to replace.
edits: Added a single forward-looking sentence in the final corridor paragraph to bridge Gabriel's disappearance into the Caldera Junction layover scene.
